expectations.evidence: Leads with 'Legion is humming — 13 workers active' but immediately contextualizes with streams and action (bug report routing). Does not lead with 'controller is busy'.
Mentions 13 workers and streams but doesn't give concrete progress numbers (PRs merged, issues closed, issues remaining). Says it could check for overlap but doesn't proactively gather numbers.
Explicitly maps: 'none of the active Legion streams are on your P0s today (environment issues, 1Password/Workable reskin)'
Identifies that Legion work doesn't overlap with P0s and offers to check for overlap or refocus
